creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun Mar 10 19:16:21 UTC 2019
New revision: 495315
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/495315

Log:
  New port: devel/brz

  Breezy is a version control system implemented in Python with
  multi-format support and an emphasis on hackability.

  Currently, Breezy has built-in support for the Git and Bazaar file
  formats and network protocols.

  WWW: https://www.breezy-vcs.org/

  PR:		236435
  Submitted by:	fullermd@over-yonder.net

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/brz/
  head/devel/brz/Makefile
  head/devel/brz/distinfo
  head/devel/brz/pkg-descr
